Name: MI-001
Summary__c: Favorable response in RA patients unresponsive to prior DMARDs
Detail__c: HCP1 has observed that patients with long-standing RA who previously failed multiple DMARDs have shown clinical improvement within the first 6–8 weeks on Immunexis. Improvements were noted in DAS28 scores, morning stiffness duration, and patient fatigue. HCP1 is optimistic about its role in refractory cases.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-002
Summary__c: Interest in early use of Immunexis in undifferentiated arthritis
Detail__c: HCP1 has expressed interest in exploring Immunexis earlier in the treatment algorithm, especially for patients with undifferentiated arthritis showing aggressive onset. The HCP questions whether initiating Immunexis prior to conventional biologics may prevent long-term joint damage and disability.

Name: MI-003
Summary__c: Requests more comparative data in PsA
Detail__c: HCP2 inquired about Immunexis' performance in psoriatic arthritis compared to IL-17 inhibitors. The HCP is currently hesitant to switch stable patients due to limited real-world evidence. He would consider Immunexis if head-to-head trial data becomes available.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-004
Summary__c: Wants real-world outcomes before adoption in clinical practice
Detail__c: HCP2 emphasized the need for long-term observational studies before incorporating Immunexis into standard treatment. He is skeptical about relying solely on controlled trial data and is awaiting registry outcomes on durability and adverse event profile.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-005
Summary__c: Unconvinced by MOA claims for Immunexis
Detail__c: HCP3 stated that while the MOA for Immunexis appears novel, the lack of correlation between biomarker suppression and sustained remission leaves him unconvinced. He would like to see mechanistic studies with translational endpoints that support its clinical value.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-006
Summary__c: Concerns about immunogenicity beyond one year
Detail__c: HCP3 expressed concerns regarding potential anti-drug antibody formation with prolonged Immunexis use. The HCP noted that loss of efficacy in Year 2 could point to delayed immunogenicity not captured in pivotal trials. She is looking for registry safety updates.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-007
Detail__c: HCP4 highlighted significant improvements in fatigue and functional ability among her patients treated with Immunexis. She believes PROMIS-Fatigue scores offer a useful complement to lab endpoints and should be integrated into ongoing monitoring.

sf__Error: MALFORMED_ID:Product: id value of incorrect type: Immunexis:Product__c --
Name: MI-008
Summary__c: Asks about use in patients with multiple autoimmune conditions
Detail__c: HCP5 asked whether Immunexis has shown benefit in patients with comorbid autoimmune conditions like UC or Hashimoto's. He speculated on its mechanism being adaptable beyond a single pathway, but remains cautious about off-label potential.
